args.claim: SpaceX (Space Exploration Technologies Corp.) was founded by Elon Musk in 2002.
args.quote: SpaceX, in full Space Exploration Technologies Corp., is an American aerospace company founded in 2002 by entrepreneur Elon Musk.

args.claim: SpaceX was founded with the goal of reducing spaceflight costs and enabling more affordable, reusable rockets and ultimately human missions to Mars.
args.quote: Musk founded SpaceX with the goal of making spaceflight more affordable and enabling the colonization of Mars, in part through the development of reusable rockets.

args.claim: Falcon 1 was SpaceX’s first rocket, a small two‑stage liquid‑fueled launcher designed to place small satellites into orbit at lower cost than competitors.
args.quote: Its first rocket, Falcon 1, was a small, two-stage, liquid-fueled launcher designed to put small satellites into orbit at much lower cost than its competitors.

args.claim: Falcon 1’s first launch attempt in March 2006 failed because of a fuel leak and fire.
args.quote: Falcon 1’s first launch, in March 2006, failed because of a fuel leak and fire.

args.claim: Falcon 1’s second and third launches, in March 2007 and August 2008, also failed to reach orbit.
args.quote: Subsequent launches in March 2007 and August 2008 also failed to reach orbit.

args.claim: On September 28, 2008, Falcon 1 became the first privately developed liquid‑fueled rocket to reach Earth orbit.
args.quote: On September 28, 2008, Falcon 1 became the first privately developed liquid-fueled rocket to reach Earth orbit.

args.claim: Three months after Falcon 1’s first successful orbital flight in September 2008, SpaceX secured a NASA ISS servicing contract worth more than $1 billion, effectively closing the Falcon 1 chapter as the company shifted focus to Falcon 9.
args.quote: Three months later, SpaceX won a NASA contract worth more than $1 billion to resupply the International Space Station, effectively closing the Falcon 1 chapter as the company shifted its focus to the larger Falcon 9 rocket.

args.claim: Elon Musk founded SpaceX on May 6, 2002.
args.quote: Elon Musk founded SpaceX (Space Exploration Technologies Corp.) on May 6, 2002.
